div.h1: DLQ Replay: New Message, New Offset
div.p: Replay publishes a brand new message — it does NOT restore to original position

g.text: Replay = NEW offset, end of queue
Consumers see replay as brand new message
Partial work from original attempt repeated
Why not restore? Complex coordination required
New offset is safer: no coordination, no corruption
Bug was fixed — replay after fix deployed
Transient failure resolved — retry makes sense
Consumer is idempotent — safe to reprocess
When New-Offset Replay is NOT OK
Solution: 'reprocess from offset X' with checkpoint

text.tspan: // Check if this is a replay
